revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

An audible signal intended to warn or guide ships in low visibility.

Also called Fog Signal or Sound Signal.



Source: IALA Guideline G1090 on The Use of Audible Signals Edition 1 December 2012.
